name: Garlic Mashed Potatoes
recipeIngredient: 4 Large Red, Sangre, or Russet Potatoes (peeled and cubed)
recipeInstructions:
1. Scrub the potatoes and place them in a heavy, medium saucepot.
2. Add garlic and salt; cover with cold water.
3. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer until the potatoes are tender when pierced with a fork, about 15-20 minutes.
4. Drain the potatoes and garlic well.
5. Add chicken stock and mash together using a potato masher or ricer.
6. Stir in butter; season with salt and pepper.
